requirement_topic.en: Outdoor Noise Emissions for Listed Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 列名户外设备噪声排放
requirement_topic.zht: 列名戶外設備噪聲排放

summary.en: For outdoor-use power tools that fall within the listed categories, the outdoor-noise regime is applied with LWA-type marking and noise limits in the Turkey-aligned route, with declarations linked to the marketed outdoor model and power class.
summary.zh: 对于列入类别的户外用途电动工具，土耳其对齐路径应按该规则执行LWA式标识和噪声限值，并按具体销售户外型号和功率等级提交声明。
summary.zht: 對於列入類別的戶外用途電動工具，土耳其對齊路徑應按該規則執行LWA式標示和噪聲限值，並按具體銷售戶外型號和功率等級提交聲明。

standards_or_laws: Noise marking and limit logic through EU-aligned practice referenced in Turkey-facing documentation

summary.en: China domestic power-tool compliance usually covers electrical and mechanical safety and rarely includes Turkey-facing outdoor-noise classification and LWA-style declarations as a dedicated workflow.
summary.zh: 中国国内文件常覆盖电气和机械安全，但通常不会以独立流程覆盖土耳其向的户外噪声分类和LWA式声明。
summary.zht: 中國國內文件常覆蓋電氣和機械安全，但通常不會以獨立流程覆蓋土耳其向的戶外噪音分類和LWA式聲明。

standards_or_laws: China domestic noise and workplace acoustic references where applicable

gap.en: The common gap is assuming domestic GB 3883 clearance equals outdoor-noise regulatory readiness. For outdoor SKUs, model-level noise categorization and declaration wording must be added before Turkish placement.
gap.zh: 常见差距是误认为国内GB 3883合规即可覆盖户外噪声监管。对于户外SKU，需要增加型号级噪声分类和声明措辞才能投放土耳其。
gap.zht: 常見差距是誤認為國內GB 3883合規即可覆蓋戶外噪音監管。對於戶外SKU，需要增加型號級噪音分類和聲明措辭才能投放土耳其。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for listed outdoor models in the referenced regime, including classification, marking language, and measured declarations.
mandatory_status.cn: 中国GB 3883是国内基线，不构成土耳其户外噪声监管替代。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Potentially not ready for Turkey for listed outdoor tools until LWA and noise declarations are produced for the exact model class and use pattern.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对列入户外类别的工具，如未对具体型号类别和用途进行LWA与噪声声明的完整处理，可能不符合土耳其要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對列入戶外類別的工具，如未對具體型號類別與用途進行LWA與噪聲聲明的完整處理，可能不符合土耳其要求。
